title: Vanilla Spice
description: Collections of mods that aim to improve the Minecraft experience without changing the game.
body: Vanilla Spice is a collection of fabric mods that aims to improve but not overhaul the vanilla minecraft experience. It contains many quality of life (QoL) features, as well as optimisation mods, and only a few basic light mods that add any new mechanics. None of these mechanics severely alter gameplay.
